---
title: "Welcome"
description: "A placeholder post for the first version of the blog."
author: "Basher4"
date: "2026-04-26"
categories:
  - meta
  - quarto
---

This is a placeholder article for the blog.

## What belongs here

Use this post to check that rendering, navigation, syntax highlighting, and publishing all work before writing the first real article.

```python
def hello(name: str) -> str:
    return f"Hello, {name}!"

print(hello("Quarto"))
```

## Next steps

Replace this content with a real technical note once the GitHub Pages workflow is publishing correctly.
